meta.description: Smell index for Alpine.js. Maps to rubric.json rule_ref.

smells.name: Unsafe x-data initialisation
smells.summary: User or HTML content interpolated into Alpine state without @js or encoding.

smells.name: x-for without stable key
smells.summary: template x-for lacks :key where items reorder or mutate.

smells.name: Large inline script in Blade
smells.summary: Hundreds of lines of JS in view instead of module or Alpine.data.

smells.name: Parallel x-model and wire:model
smells.summary: Same field bound in Alpine and Livewire without @entangle.

smells.name: x-init fetch without handling
smells.summary: Async load in x-init without loading or error state.

smells.name: x-effect side effects
smells.summary: x-effect mutates external state or DOM without clear scope.

smells.name: $wire used without guard
smells.summary: $wire calls before Livewire hydrates or without optional chaining.

smells.name: Reusable Alpine.data
smells.summary: Logic extracted to Alpine.data or a small module.
